MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-04-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2009 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference; Eugley vs. Eugley

Appearances; Mark Epstein, Esq. for Plaintiff
Thomas Drohan, Esq. for Defendant.

Case setttled. Terms; Tenant to vacate by 9/1/09. Payments to tenats of $20,000. as follows;
$5,000. by 6/25/09, $10,000. upon vacating and $5,000. by 12/15/09. Each party to waive all known claims. Defendant to retain washer, dryer, stove and refridgerators. Judgement to be sought if not vacated as agreed by parties.Terms of settlement to be reduced into writing for approval. Dept. 218 Comm. W. Gargano, Clerk R. Pascual, Reporter Los Jones # 6389

Motion To Strike Portions Of Deft'S Answer; Request To Take Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Apr-16-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF JEFFREY EUGLEY'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Defendant's Answer IS GRANTED AS TO PARAGRAPHS 7 AND 14 WHICH SEEK AFFIRMATIVE RELIEF BEYOND ADJUDICATING POSSESSION; DENIED AS TO PARAGRAPH 13. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
